name: nodeauth
description: High-security, Lightweight 2FA/TOTP management tool supporting Cloudflare Serverless and Docker on-premise deployment.
author: nodeauth

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix backend & npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.test:watch: npm run test --prefix backend & npm run test --prefix frontend
